news.t: Sophus Capital Launches Two Actively Managed Emerging Market ETFs on Nasdaq

holdings.infoBox: EMSC is an equity ETF with a total of 125 individual holdings. The top holdings are Powertech Technology stock at 2.14%, Winbond Electronics at 1.94%, Evergreen Aviation Technologies at 1.94%, Chung-Hsin Electric and Machinery Manufacturing at 1.70%, and R R Kabel at 1.68%.

overview.description: The Sophus Capital Emerging Market Small Cap ETF (EMSC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed, high conviction fund investing in small-cap stocks with compelling valuations from emerging markets. The portfolio is constructed based on quantitative and fundamental analysis EMSC was launched on May 20, 2026 and is issued by Sophus.
